Vik's notes:

so i had a whole plan of doing stuff for the holidays but Cyberpunk, warframe and marvel rivals kinda took me over for the holidays (I played warframe for 7 hours straight until like 8 am..) I also do apologise that I only did he pronouns, sorry to any enbies who do use my bots, hopefully I will update it when I have time!

Also uhhh sorry if you do like visi, I just didn't know who else to do and I kinda just hate visi for a lot of reason erm (first time trying actual angst hope y'all like it gulp) Also set in a society where Red Ring hasn't like... decided to make Sardines a problem.

Happy New Years to everyone! I hope 2026 will be a good year for everyone!
